title: Vanilla Food Expanded
description: Adds a variety vanilla style food to your game such as muffins and fried eggs. Vanilla friendly!
body:
# Vanilla Food Expanded
Adds a variety vanilla style food to your game! Resource pack included!

---
**HOW TO INSTALL AS A DATAPACK**

Just put the zipped file into your worlds datapacks folder AND your resource pack folder. If it says it is outdated, ignore the message. As long as you are on the version you put in when downloading it will work. The datapack will show up as incompatible but it will work anyway.

## All the foods in this datapack
<details>
<summary>Muffins</summary>
Muffins are a good alternative to bread. If you can get a sugercane farm going they are really cheap to make and provide similar outcomes to bread. Wait, are you eating the paper?

---

**Craft a Berry Muffin with sweet berries, wheat, and paper. Cheap to get!**
![Cheap to get!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc9dea6a36618e91184d6c1764a3f7615df0befd.png)

---

**Craft a Chocolate Muffin with cocoa beans, wheat, and paper. A better version of the berry muffin!**
![A better version of the berry muffin!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dad0fa13f2be6f0cf366416488f1bf0ba420f9b9.png)

---

**Craft a Glowberry Muffin with glow berries, wheat, and paper. A slightly better version of the berry muffin!**
![A slightly better version of the berry muffin!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e7717ac29d36e8acb1a454e3770a98c722aa0f5.png)
</details>
<details>
<summary>Fried Eggs</summary>
Eggs are a really good food to use instead of cooked meat. They give less nutrition but more saturation than cooked meats. They can be cooked on a campfire, in a furnace, or a smoker.

---

**Cook chicken eggs in a furnace to get a Fried Egg**
![A powerful early game food](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf37ed4d742bd166a9b78e0fbf191f728160e674.png)

---

**Cook turtle eggs in a furnace to get a Fried Turtle Egg**
![Why are you cooking turtle eggs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0029b496cecdfe420cb13b6e46e4427931e00a24.png)

---

**Cook dragon eggs in a furnace to get a Fried Dragon Egg**
![The rarest food](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a98de42b50e139e497acaac4de90a70a376eb8b7.png)
</details>


## FAQ
**Does this work on a server?**
Yes. Go into your servers folders and go to `world -> datapacks` and put the datapack there. This datapack works multiplayer so play with however many people you would like! Every player needs the resource pack or mod to see the items correctly.

## Incompatibles
- Some resource packs might override the new food textures, to make sure this does not happen have the food galore resource pack at the top.
- JEI does not seem to show you the recipes, just use this page to see the recipes for each item.
